description_long: This is a hand axe featuring a robust, slightly curved wooden handle and a prominent, wedge-shaped metal head. The axe head is painted a vivid red with a black cutting edge, giving it high visibility and a utilitarian appearance. The handle appears to be made of natural wood, showing a smooth but slightly textured surface for grip. The blade is single-edged, broad, and flat, with a rectangular poll and a straight edge, suitable for chopping wood or similar tasks. The mounting of the blade to the handle is traditional, with the head fitted securely onto the top of the handle. No visible markings, engravings, or labels are present on either the handle or the blade.
description: A hand axe with a red and black metal head and a curved wooden handle, designed for chopping tasks. The blade is broad and single-edged, with a traditional mounting style.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile of the axe, highlighting the curved wooden handle and the red-painted metal head with a black edge.
description_view_1: Top-down view displaying the narrow width of the blade and handle, emphasizing the thickness and alignment of the axe head.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, showing the other face of the axe head and handle curvature.
description_view_3: Bottom-up view focusing on the pointed end of the blade and the straight alignment of the handle.
attribute_handle_type: Curved wooden handle with an oval cross-section, smooth surface, and ergonomic grip; traditional style.
attribute_blade_design: Single-edged, wedge-shaped steel blade with a straight edge, rectangular poll, and no beard; painted red with a black cutting edge.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional wedged mounting with the blade fitted onto the top of the wooden handle.
